$comment: Canonical pricing table — the code home of docs/viral-flow.md §10. The client (src/credits.ts) and Cloud Functions (functions/src/credits.ts) each keep their own typed copies of these numbers because the two TypeScript builds and the Firebase deploy boundary (only functions/ is uploaded) make a single runtime-shared module awkward. ct/pricing-parity.ct.ts fails the build if either copy drifts from this file — so the duplication is never silent.
